layer: CMP slurry and wet-process materials bottleneck
bottleneck_reason: Official filings connect product qualification, domestic substitution, revenue growth, and margin resilience to a semiconductor-materials bottleneck.
revenue_transmission: Revenue transmits through customer qualification, materials share gain, fab utilization, and repeat consumables demand.
required_next_evidence: Verify customer contribution, capacity utilization, and product-line mix in the next L0 filing cycle.
posterior_basis: Official report evidence supports H3 evidence-supported growth while customer and order reconciliation remain active research tasks.

key_evidence_refs.claim: CNINFO announcement artifacts anchor the official disclosure trail used by the research packet.
The financial quality matrix carries the revenue and margin preflight evidence.

contrary_evidence: Customer concentration, gross-margin durability, and capacity utilization still require next-cycle tracking.
research_questions: Verify customer/order contribution and capacity utilization in the next filing cycle.
Separate CMP slurry, wet chemicals, and adjacent materials revenue contribution before any S/A upgrade.
